steps.t: Bolg Maufulug lies west and a little north from Talan Fanuidhol. Maenhador has asked you to burn the Orc-banner at Bolg Maufulug and defeat the camp's…
Maenhador is at Talan Fanuidhol, east and a little south of Bolg Maufulug. You should return to Maenhador with the tidings of your victory at Bolg Mau…
